sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69547" key="muwto/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυωτός</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μῦς</foreign> IV) <sense id="n69547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">furnished with muscles</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σάρκες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">72</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
